'''竏嗜-sh-sh''' ('''kanashash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yive|yive]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yive|yive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗜-sh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kanashash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinashash|thinashash]] || [[word:jinashash|jinashash]] || [[word:shinashash|shinashash]] || [[word:kinashash|kinashash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunashash|thuthunashash]] || [[word:jujunashash|jujunashash]] || [[word:shushunashash|shushunashash]] || [[word:kukunashash|kukunashash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunashash|thunashash]] || [[word:junashash|junashash]] || [[word:shunashash|shunashash]] || [[word:kunashash|kunashash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunashash|thunashash]] || [[word:junashash|junashash]] || [[word:shunashash|shunashash]] || [[word:kunashash|kunashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenashash|thenashash]] || [[word:jenashash|jenashash]] || [[word:shenashash|shenashash]] || [[word:kenashash|kenashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonashash|thothonashash]] || [[word:jojonashash|jojonashash]] || [[word:shoshonashash|shoshonashash]] || [[word:kokonashash|kokonashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonashash|thonashash]] || [[word:jonashash|jonashash]] || [[word:shonashash|shonashash]] || [[word:konashash|konashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonashash|thonashash]] || [[word:jonashash|jonashash]] || [[word:shonashash|shonashash]] || [[word:konashash|konashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦnashash|thﾃｦnashash]] || [[word:jﾃｦnashash|jﾃｦnashash]] || [[word:shﾃｦnashash|shﾃｦnashash]] || [[word:kﾃｦnashash|kﾃｦnashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanashash|thathanashash]] || [[word:jajanashash|jajanashash]] || [[word:shashanashash|shashanashash]] || [[word:kakanashash|kakanashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanashash|thanashash]] || [[word:janashash|janashash]] || [[word:shanashash|shanashash]] || [[word:kanashash|kanashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanashash|thanashash]] || [[word:janashash|janashash]] || [[word:shanashash|shanashash]] || [[word:kanashash|kanashash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanashash|shanashash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanashash|goshanashash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanashash|gokishanashash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanashashnﾃｼ|shanashashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanashashnknﾃｼ|goshanashashnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashashnﾃｼ|gokishanashashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanashashﾃｫ|shanashashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanashashnkshﾃｫ|goshanashashnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanashashﾃｫ|gokishanashashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashashro|shanashashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashashnkro|goshanashashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashashro|gokishanashashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashashmu|shanashashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashashnkmu|goshanashashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashashmu|gokishanashashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanashasher|shanashasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanashashnksher|goshanashashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanashasher|gokishanashasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanashashng|shanashashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanashashnkng|goshanashashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanashashng|gokishanashashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanashashya|shanashashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanashashnkya|goshanashashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanashashya|gokishanashashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanashashyam|shanashashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanashashnkyam|goshanashashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanashashyam|gokishanashashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shanashashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshanashashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishanashashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashashnﾃｼro|shanashashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashashnknﾃｼro|goshanashashnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashashnﾃｼro|gokishanashashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashashnﾃｼmu|shanashashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashashnknﾃｼmu|goshanashashnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashashnﾃｼmu|gokishanashashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashashﾃｫnﾃｼ|shanashashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshanashashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashashﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishanashashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashashﾃｫro|shanashashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashashnkshﾃｫro|goshanashashnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashashﾃｫro|gokishanashashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashashﾃｫmu|shanashashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashashnkshﾃｫmu|goshanashashnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashashﾃｫmu|gokishanashashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashashronﾃｼ|shanashashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashashnkronﾃｼ|goshanashashnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashashronﾃｼ|gokishanashashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashashroshﾃｫ|shanashashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashashnkroshﾃｫ|goshanashashnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashashroshﾃｫ|gokishanashashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashashromu|shanashashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashashnkromu|goshanashashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashashromu|gokishanashashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashashmunﾃｼ|shanashashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashashnkmunﾃｼ|goshanashashnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashashmunﾃｼ|gokishanashashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashashmushﾃｫ|shanashashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashashnkmushﾃｫ|goshanashashnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashashmushﾃｫ|gokishanashashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashashmuro|shanashashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashashnkmuro|goshanashashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashashmuro|gokishanashashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
